code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut sorted = true
mut have_prev = false
mut prev = 0
mut tok = ""
mut in_tok = false
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if in_tok
      let parsed = string.parse_int(tok)
      let v = match parsed
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if have_prev and v < prev
        sorted = false
      end
      prev = v
      have_prev = true
      tok = ""
      in_tok = false
    end
  else
    tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    in_tok = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_tok
  let parsed = string.parse_int(tok)
  let v = match parsed
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if have_prev and v < prev
    sorted = false
  end
  prev = v
  have_prev = true
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
